\tzpentry{ID4501}{Iomega Phase Angle Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4501 introduces Iomega Phase Angle Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \sum_{l,m} Y_l^m(\theta,\phi)\, J_l\!\left(\alpha_l\,\frac{r}{R}\right)\, e^{i\omega_{\mathrm{beat}} t}, \quad \omega_{\mathrm{beat}}=\tfrac{1}{2}(440+446)\,\mathrm{Hz}, \]
